name: HWR_SRVY_DETAIL
description: This table will be used to store information related to survey in terms of its participants.

columns.Name: SURVEY_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Survey Id identifying the Survey entry in this table.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire ID associated with the Survey.

columns.Name: QUESTIONNAIRE_VERSION
columns.Comments: This is the Questionnaire Version associated with the Questionnaire ID of this Survey.

columns.Name: PARTICIPANT_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Fusion Id of the participant of the Survey.

columns.Name: IS_COMPLETED
columns.Comments: This determines if the participant completed the survey or not

columns.Name: RESPONSE_ANONYMOUS
columns.Comments: This determines if the participant responses are anonymous or not

columns.Name: IS_VIEWED
columns.Comments: This determines if the participant opened the survey or not

columns.Name: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: SURVEY_DETAIL_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
